fields.summary: API rate limiting for public endpoints
fields.description: We need per-tenant rate limiting on the gateway to prevent the noisy-neighbor incidents that hit prod last quarter (see PROJ-381). Token-bucket per tenant; default budget configurable per tier.

comments.body: Should we use Redis or in-process LRU? Redis matches PR #287's choice.
Going with Redis — matches our existing infra.

fields.description: One tenant's batch job consumed 80% of API capacity for 4 hours. Root cause: no rate limiting at the gateway layer. Action items: implement per-tenant limits (PROJ-412).

fields.summary: Audit log retention — remove session token storage
fields.description: Legal flagged that we store session tokens in the audit log indefinitely. Need to either redact at write time or rewrite the auth middleware to not log tokens at all.
